name: 1 ARTEMIS PAPIER
actions: Assert that the page has links
Assert that 'ARTEMIS Joint vision' is present in the page

name: 2 Sign Up to Google Gruyere
actions: Type in 'toto' in the field 'User name'
Assert that 'Account created' is displayed on this page

name: 3 All Snippets Displayed
actions: Assert that 'Gruyere' OR 'Cheddar' is displayed on this page.
Assert that 'Bleu d'Auvergne' is displayed on this page.

name: 4 Add a New Personal Snippet
actions: Type in 'toto' in the field 'User name'
Assert that 'TRUC' is present in the content of the page

name: 5 Sign Up and Sign Out from Google Gruyere
actions: Type in 'toto' in the field 'User name'
Assert that 'toto' is not displayed on this page
Assert that 'Sign in' is displayed on this page

name: 6 Add and Delete Personal Snippet
actions: Type in 'toto' in the field 'User name'
Assert that 'No snippets.' is present in the content of the page

name: 7 No Snippet After Sign Up
actions: Type in 'toto' in the field 'User name'
Assert that 'No snippets' is displayed on the page

name: 8 Change Password after Sign Up
actions: Type in 'toto' in the field 'User name'
Type in 'ouioui' in the field 'User name'
Type in 'toto' in the field 'OLD Password:'
Type in 'titi' in the field 'NEW Password:'
Type in 'ouioui' in the field 'User name'
Assert that 'ouioui' is displayed on this page

name: 9 Wrong Keyword in Snippets
actions: Assert that 'Mozzarella' is displayed on this page.

name: 10 Create Account Missing Password
actions: Type in 'toto' in the field 'User name'
Assert that 'Account created' is displayed on this page
Assert that 'Missing Password' is displayed on this page

name: 11 Access Snippets Without Login
actions: Assert that 'toto' is not present on this page
Assert that 'My Snippets' is present on this page

name: 12 Display Security Projects
actions: Assert that the page has a link 'ANR Severitas 21-25'
Assert that 'CIFRE Thesis with the Michelin company 13-16' is not present

name: 13 Nonexistent Course
actions: Assert that 'Javascript' is displayed in the page

name: 14 Display PHP Courses
actions: Assert that the page has sentences containing the term 'Cours'
Assert that there is at least one 'Cours' on this page

name: 15 ARTEMIS PAPIER False
actions: Assert that the page has links
Assert that the page has links with the term 'ARTEMIS'

name: 16 Change User Name in Profile
actions: Type in 'toto' in the field 'User name'
Type in 'titi' in the field 'User name'
Assert that 'titi' is present in the content of the page

Assert that 'fifi' is not displayed on this page

name: 8WaterMan bill
actions: Click on the 'BILL' button for order id '1045'
Assert that 'Order No :1045' is displayed on this page
Assert that 'pending' is displayed on this page

name: 9WaterMan Product
